login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your journey
login.oidcTrouble: Having trouble with {{provider}}? Use local login
login.connectionError: Cannot connect to the server. Please check your connection and try again.
login.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
login.oidcInitError: Failed to initiate OIDC login. Please try again or use local login.
login.oidcAutoDisabled: {{provider}} authentication has been automatically disabled after {{count}} consecutive failures (including timeouts). You can retry or continue with local login.
login.oidcManuallyDisabled: {{provider}} authentication has been manually disabled. You can re-enable it or continue with local login.
login.oidcErrorsSummary: {{provider}} authentication encountered {{count}} error(s), possibly due to timeouts or server issues.
login.rateLimited: Too many failed login attempts. Please try again later.
login.sessionRevoked: Your session has been revoked. Please sign in again.
login.oidcOnlyRedirectFailed: Unable to reach the identity provider. Please contact your administrator.

oidcErrors.stateMismatch: OIDC authentication failed: security state mismatch. Please try again.
oidcErrors.exchangeFailed: Failed to complete OIDC login. Please try again or contact your administrator.
oidcErrors.userNotProvisioned: Your account has not been set up yet. Contact your administrator to get access.
oidcErrors.providerUnreachable: Could not reach the OIDC provider. Please try again later.
oidcErrors.invalidToken: Invalid authentication token received. Please try again.
oidcErrors.unknown: An unexpected OIDC error occurred. Please try again.
